title: The Shadow Bridge for Hodge — Explicit Construction

analysis.object: T728: The Shadow Bridge for Hodge — Explicit Construction depth analysis

shadow_depth_theorem.description: Shadow Depth Theorem: shadow(EML-inf object) in {EML-2, EML-3}

hodge_class_as_shadow.description: Hodge class = shadow of algebraic cycle under cycle class map
hodge_class_as_shadow.reason: de Rham class is oscillatory shadow

shadow_uniqueness.description: If shadows are unique, algebraic preimage unique given Hodge class

surjectivity_from_uniqueness.description: Unique shadow means every Hodge class has exactly one preimage
surjectivity_from_uniqueness.reason: Requires shadow map to be bijection -- not just injection

shadow_bridge_explicit.description: gamma: Z^p(X) -> H^{2p}(X,Q): explicit cycle to cohomology

surjectivity_gap_explicit.description: ker(gamma^perp) = Hodge classes not hit by gamma -- the gap
surjectivity_gap_explicit.reason: Complement of image in Hdg^p(X) -- what we must show is empty

shadow_argument_conclusion.description: Shadow uniqueness + theorem of the fixed point type -> surjectivity conditional
shadow_argument_conclusion.reason: Requires fixed point theorem -- next session target

analysis.theorem: T728: The Shadow Bridge for Hodge — Explicit Construction (S1007).

key_theorem: T728: The Shadow Bridge for Hodge — Explicit Construction (S1007).
